MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On First Cause Of Action
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ARCHETYPE LIGHTING SALES, LLC's Motion for Summary Adjudication On First Cause Of Action.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for summary adjudication on first cause of action" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Frances S. Cheever, Esq., GLUCK DANIEL ATKINSON LLP, 415-510-2114, litigation@gluckdaniel.com, for Defendant AION LED, INC. AND CHRISTINE IRONFIELD.
No other appearances

Hearing is held. discussed, not argued. The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT AION LED, INC. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED.

Counsel for defendant to submit a proposed order using the Mandatory JCC Form MC-030.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
